purpose: Validate the source-available membrane for projecting macro substrate into Microcosm and proving standalone runtime severance without private runtime dependencies, authority upgrades, or release/secret-export claims.

private_state_exclusion_rules.raw_seed_body: forbidden; use path-level source refs and omission receipts only
private_state_exclusion_rules.provider_payload_bodies: forbidden; fixture shape and receipt summaries are the public replacement
private_state_exclusion_rules.private_source_bodies: true private bodies are forbidden; source-available macro proof/tool/pattern/receipt bodies use the classified import lane with provenance and claim ceilings

authority_ceiling: classified public macro bodies, metadata, fixture shape, standards, and receipt refs may enter the Microcosm runtime tree with provenance; macro-origin refs are not runtime dependencies and do not authorize release, publication, provider authority, secret export, or whole-system correctness
anti_claim: This fixture manifest accepts classified source-available macro body imports and standalone severance evidence. It does not authorize true private body export, hosted deployment, publication operations, recipient work, provider calls, secret export, Lean/Lake special casing, or whole-system correctness.
